final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce marketing with artistic typography and layered text effects.

Style/medium: bold graphic poster design, editorial advertising layout, contemporary commercial art direction
Composition: 16:9 landscape format, dynamic layered typography with overlapping text blocks, product or main subject partially obscuring some letterforms, balanced negative space to prevent visual clutter
Subject: artistic display typography with stacked/layered letterforms, commercial product or central visual element integrated with text
Scene/backdrop: clean but visually rich environment supporting the promotional message, depth through layering
Lighting/mood: controlled studio lighting with subtle shadows to enhance depth between layers, energetic and commercial mood
Color palette: high-contrast brand colors with clear hierarchy, accent colors for call-to-action elements, cohesive palette preventing chaos
Materials/textures: crisp vector typography with subtle dimensional effects, smooth product surfaces, paper or digital texture as needed
Constraints: text must remain legible despite layering; product integration must feel intentional not accidental; overall composition must be complex but organized
Avoid: unreadable text due to excessive overlap; cluttered chaos without hierarchy; generic stock photo aesthetic; 8K/masterpiece filler language
